model.description: COHO Analytics cohort-component model. Base population from DOLA 2024 SYA. Annual cohort progression with age-distributed migration.

headship_rate.notes: Fixed at national level. Local rates may differ significantly, especially in rural or high-cost areas.

vacancy_target.notes: 5% vacancy is a common planning-level assumption. Actual vacancy varies by market.

survival_rates.notes: 5-year survival rates interpolated to annual. Not county-calibrated.

fertility_rates.notes: ASFRs per woman per 5-year period. Applied as multipliers in scenario presets.

migration_distribution.notes: Migration distributed by age using national proportions. Not calibrated to specific counties.

baseline.label: Baseline (Moderate Growth)
baseline.attribution: COHO preset using DOLA base population
baseline.notes: Multipliers of 1.0 = no change from model defaults. Migration of 500/yr is a representative moderate-growth assumption, not derived from DOLA forecasts.

low-growth.label: Low Growth
low-growth.notes: Conservative scenario with lower fertility and net in-migration.

high-growth.label: High Growth
high-growth.notes: Optimistic scenario with higher fertility and net in-migration.

widgets.label: Housing Units Needed 2024–2050 (line chart)
widgets.notes: Cohort-component projection from DOLA base population using COHO-defined scenario parameters.

widgets.label: Detailed Annual Projections table
widgets.notes: Annual population, households, and units-needed figures from cohort-component model.
